course_description.overview: The 120km GranFondo route takes riders through the scenic Fraser Valley agricultural lowlands with rolling hills and steady climbs.

key_segments.name: Fraser Valley Loop
key_segments.description: Scenic route featuring rolling hills, steady climbs, and agricultural landscapes through Langley and surrounding areas.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging yet rewarding with rolling terrain and climbs suitable for kicking off the GranFondo season; fully supported with 5 aid stations.

logistics.getting_there: Start/finish at Eagle Acres Dairy Farm, 8796 240 Street, Langley Township, BC.
logistics.accommodation: Special rates at Sandman Hotel Langley and Sandman Signature Langley Hotel (block code: 2606GFONDO) for June 5-8; book early due to high occupancy.
logistics.registration_details: Online registration from Oct 14, fees $239-$320 for 120km (increasing tiers), closes June 1 or when sold out; on-site if space allows; non-refundable.
logistics.bike_logistics: All bike types welcome on shorter routes; on-course mechanical support provided.
logistics.local_considerations: Event may be canceled due to weather, safety concerns; no refunds. Package pickup June 3 & 6.

final_verdict.one_liner: Fraser Valley's largest community-focused GranFondo with epic post-ride party and charity impact.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: All levels from families to GranFondo starters seeking scenic roads, support, and festival vibes.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the scenery, support, and unique farm festival experience at solid value.
pro_tips: Book accommodation early with event block codes.
Opt for 120km to experience full Fraser Valley beauty and 5 aid stations.
Arrive for package pickup days ahead.
Prepare for rolling climbs; enjoy the post-ride burgers, music, and farm animals.

youtube_data.search_query: Valley GranFondo gran fondo cycling Langley

videos.title: Applewood Valley Gran Fondo 2022
videos.description: Some quick cuts of the 105km fondo event touring across the Fraser Valley on Saturday June 4th, 2022.
videos.curation_reason: Long-form cycling-focused content with highest view count and substantial duration showing race experience.

videos.title: Applewood Valley GranFondo 2023
videos.description:
Ready, set, go 🏁 🚴‍♂️

Relive the excitement of the 2023 Applewood Valley GranFondo here 👏

The 2023 instalment of the GranFondo was an amazing day spent out in scenic Fort Langley. The weather was warm, drinks were cold, and smiles were all around. We can't wait until next year!

videos.curation_reason: Recent race recap with participant interviews providing specific course feedback and race atmosphere insights.

videos.title: Applewood Valley GranFondo 2024
videos.description:
Welcome to Applewood Auto Group!

Our commitment to the communities we serve. We’re driven by constantly giving back to and improving the communities in which we serve.

Throughout each year we’re proud to either sponsor or be involved in all sorts of events.

One of the events we’re proud to be a title sponsor of is the Applewood Valley GranFondo, an annual cycling race in beautiful Fort Langley, BC. This year’s event is this Sunday, June 9th.

Stay tuned for more content from this event, and many others in what’s going to be a busy summer for Applewood ☀️☀️


It's All Good at Applewood

https://www.applewood.ca
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/applewoodautogroup
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/applewoodautogroup

videos.title: The Applewood Valley GranFondo, Fort Langley 2024, June 9th
videos.description: The longest distance of the event, the 120km GranFondo is a great way to kick off your GranFondo season. Some rolling hills and steady climbs will challenge you as you make your way around the Fraser Valley. After you finishing your ride at Eagle Acres Dairy Farm, you can enjoy your post ride beverage and meal, complete with live music and entertainment.

quotes.text: I felt great at the beginning of the race, the last 10 kilometers were a bit of a grind but it was a blast. I can't wait to do it again next year.
This is my first time for the Valley grand fondo - good rest stops, good food, weather was cooperative too, very nice weather we had today.

key_challenges.name: Final 10 kilometers
key_challenges.description: The last 10 kilometers were described as a bit of a grind, suggesting this section becomes challenging near the finish.

key_challenges.name: Hills throughout course
key_challenges.description: Riders mentioned few hills that got a little difficult during the ride.

additional_quotes.text: Good rest stops good food whether it was cooperative too very nice weather we had today
Started early it was a great time few moments few Hills you know got a little difficult but felt really good when it got to the Finish Line

rider_intel.search_text: The Valley GranFondo takes place at Eagle Acres dairy farm in Fort Langley, Fraser Valley, BC. Riders report the event has grown significantly, with about 1000 participants in previous years reaching record-breaking 1500 riders. The course features some hills throughout that riders describe as getting a little difficult, with the final 10 kilometers being particularly challenging and described as a bit of a grind. Weather conditions have been consistently favorable with beautiful warm temperatures that are neither blazing hot nor too cool, creating ideal riding conditions. The event includes good rest stops with food support along the route. Riders describe the overall experience as tough but fun, with many expressing intent to return the following year. The race starts early in the day and features a family ride component with over 100 participants.
